title: bump selinux to v1.15.1, use SetProcessKind
body:
Use [oc/selinux v1.15.1](https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.15.1) and its new [SetProcessKind](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/opencontainers/selinux@v1.15.1/go-selinux#SetProcessKind) to streamline changing the label type.

Notes:
 - I was not able to find any external users of pkg/selinux but kept it
  for now (and marked as deprecated and with [go:fix inline](https://go.dev/blog/inliner)) so
  any users can switch away, and the whole package can be removed later;
 - `go:fix` directives are not (yet) recognized by the gocheckcompilerdirectives linter,
    thus a a temporary exception in .golangci.yml.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
NONE
```
